notes: Tracks 1-21 are complete and reviewed. The later tracks documented the open_social_data compatibility contract, mapped API documentation and major collections, completed submission convergence, expanded source archival to Hugging Face and Zenodo, and notified the canonical DigitalNZ repository through issue #24. The 90% coverage gate remains CI-backed because this Windows host lacks a functional MSVC linker and Windows SDK import libraries; latest GitHub CodeQL, Docs, and Rust CI/CD checks on main provide the authoritative post-push verification.
